user_query: On fathers third day, add a superfood breakfast

fields.name: Superfood Sunrise Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense breakfast bowl loaded with antioxidant-rich berries, leafy greens, chia, and a protein base for sustained energy.
fields.meal_suggestion: Layer a base of Greek yogurt (or a plant-based yogurt) with a spoonful of mashed avocado, a handful of fresh spinach blended in, and a mix of mixed berries (blueberries, strawberries). Sprinkle with chia seeds, hemp hearts, and toasted almonds. Drizzle with a little honey or maple syrup if desired. Serve chilled with a side of whole-grain toast or a small portion of cooked quinoa for extra complex carbs.
fields.nutrition_note: High in antioxidants (berries), omega-3s and fiber (chia, hemp), healthy monounsaturated fats (avocado, almonds), and protein (yogurt, hemp). This bowl supports satiety, cognitive function, and steady morning energy while providing vitamins, minerals, and plant compounds beneficial for heart health and inflammation control.

result.reasoning: Append a nutrient-dense 'superfood' breakfast to Father's Day 3 breakfast options; position -1 adds it after the existing Whole-Grain Pancakes entry and complements the day's breakfast variety.
